paneContent:
‚îî 3 lines...

‚óè Done. The doubled framing came from ArtifactForm's .form always rendering as a card
  (padding + background + border + border-radius). Inside CreateDialog, that nested
  card sat inside the Dialog body, so you saw two stacked frames.

  Fix: when hideHeader is true (the embedded-in-Dialog case), the <form> now gets a
  data-bare attribute, and the CSS strips padding, background, border, and
  border-radius. Standalone usage of ArtifactForm keeps its card.

   - packages/storyboard/src/internals/ArtifactForm/ArtifactForm.jsx ‚Äî added
  data-bare={hideHeader || undefined}
   - packages/storyboard/src/internals/ArtifactForm/ArtifactForm.module.css ‚Äî added
  .form[data-bare] reset

  Summary widget posted next to your terminal on the canvas.

‚óè Shell "Find ArtifactForm usage" completed

‚óè Acknowledged ‚Äî that was the earlier repo-wide grep, no longer needed.

‚ùØ üì° [Broadcast two-way ACTIVE with maple-sparrow, blue-falcon]

‚óè Acknowledged ‚Äî broadcast two-way active with maple-sparrow and blue-falcon. Standing
  by.

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0 [‚éá 0.5.0*%]               @CreateDialog.jsx
